stonetop.summary: Pickpockets and cutpurses working the crowds of Marshedge.

system.concept: Pickpockets and cutpurses working the crowds of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge}.
system.description: The pickpockets and cutpurses of @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge}'s Edgemarket and the crowded streets of Dropoff. Go in unwary and, at best, they make off with only trifles — at worst, with whatever you'll miss most.
